name: chaotic_heist
turns: Hey, I have five minutes to feel chaotic—give me a mini challenge.
Okay, I stacked a mug on a notebook with a spoon acting as a lever. What next?

name: low_battery
turns: I'm wiped and my brain feels like static. Say something mellow.
Make it even smaller—I'm not up for routines.
Thanks, I might just stare at the wall.

name: focused_help
turns: Need a snack idea that's not sugar but still fun.
I have crackers and cheese—too basic?

name: anxiety_reframe
description: Walk user out of a catastrophic presentation spiral
turns: I bombed my presentation—voice shaky, slides glitching. I feel like everyone thinks I'm useless.
Okay, so let's pretend there was a camera in the room. What facts would it capture?
Give me one tiny thing I can do today so this doesn't stick forever.

name: desk_prophecy
description: 90-second ritual using pencil, lip balm, and plant cutting
turns: Give me a 90-second creative dare using a mechanical pencil, lip balm, and a plant cutting.
I named the plant Sir Chlorophyll and drew a circle with lip balm. What's the next flourish?
Prophecy written. How do I seal the spell?

name: midnight_snack
description: Gentle practical help with digestive constraints
turns: I need a midnight snack that won't wreck my stomach.
Fridge has yogurt, cucumbers, leftover rice, and some herbs—any combo ideas?
Nice, give me one more optional flourish then we can stop.
